summary: Complete testing of Chip Offer Linking feature. Backend: 5/5 tests passed (2 skipped due to no test data). Frontend: All UI features verified and working correctly.

issues: Minor: Missing aria-describedby for DialogContent (accessibility warning in console)

passed_tests: GET /api/ofertas?ativo=true returns offers with 'categoria' field (movel/m2m) - OK
GET /api/chips returns chips with oferta_nome, categoria, plan_code, valor fields - OK
PUT /api/chips/{chip_id} updates offer for available chip - OK
PUT /api/chips/{chip_id} returns 400 for activated chip - OK
PUT /api/chips/{chip_id} returns 400 for blocked chip - OK
Chips page: Table shows columns ICCID, MSISDN, Status, Oferta, Categoria, Plano/Franquia, Valor, Cliente, Data, Acoes - OK
Chips page: Edit button appears only for disponivel/reservado chips - OK
Chips page: Edit dialog 'Vincular Oferta ao Chip' opens correctly - OK
Chips page: Dropdown shows grouped offers (Movel/M2M sections) - OK
Chips page: Saving offer updates chip and shows success toast - OK
Chips page: Table updates with new offer name, categoria badge, plan, valor - OK
Ofertas page: Category tabs (Todas/Movel/M2M) with correct counters - OK
Ofertas page: Filtering by Movel shows 6 offers - OK
Ofertas page: Filtering by M2M shows 1 offer - OK
Ofertas page: Offer cards show category badges (Movel blue, M2M violet) - OK
critical_code_review_comments: PUT /api/chips/{chip_id} correctly validates chip status before allowing offer update
build_chip_response properly fetches and returns offer details (nome, categoria, valor, plan_code)
Frontend OfertaGroupedSelect component correctly groups offers by categoria
Ofertas page category tabs correctly filter and count offers

success_rate.backend: 100% (5/5 passed, 2 skipped - no test data for reserved chips and inactive offers)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (all chip offer linking UI features verified)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing chips and offers from Tá Telecom sync
context_for_next_testing_agent: Chip offer linking feature fully implemented and tested. 409 chips available (most with status 'disponivel'). 7 offers total (6 movel + 1 m2m). Chips can have offers linked via PUT /api/chips/{chip_id} with {oferta_id}. Only disponivel/reservado chips can have offers changed. Activated chips are locked. Frontend shows grouped dropdown (Movel/M2M) in edit dialog. Ofertas page has category tabs with counters.

chip_offer_linking.validation: Only disponivel/reservado chips can be updated

chips_table.categoria_badges: Blue for Movel, Violet for M2M

edit_dialog.title: Vincular Oferta ao Chip
edit_dialog.grouped_dropdown: Offers grouped by Movel and M2M categories
edit_dialog.save_action: Updates chip and shows success toast
